message:
feat: breadcrumb emphasis with per-segment styled spans and hierarchy separators (2dccg.8.2)

Add STYLE_CRUMB_ACTIVE, STYLE_CRUMB_INACTIVE, STYLE_CRUMB_SEPARATOR tokens.
Refactor breadcrumb_line() from flat string to styled Line with per-crumb
active/inactive distinction and › separator glyphs. Active filters are bold
accent, inactive are subtle, with width-aware graceful elision.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:

 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.5.4","title":"Expose degradation state in diagnostics/status for easier field triage","description":"## Goal
Make active degradation state visible so bug reports can include concrete runtime context.

## Work Items
- Ensure status/footer diagnostics clearly show current degradation mode
- Add optional debug detail for why a mode was selected (capability vs perf)
- Document how to capture this in issue reports

## Acceptance
- Agents can quickly determine whether visual flatness is due to degradation mode
- Troubleshooting no longer requires deep code spelunking for basic state info","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T19:36:52.039824793Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T20:42:01.574187601Z","closed_at":"2026-02-08T20:42:01.574155942Z","close_reason":"Superseded and merged into canonical diagnostics bead 2dccg.10.9 to avoid overlap while preserving scope.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.5.4","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.5","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T19:36:52.039824793Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.5.4","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.5.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T19:39:46.478017233Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.6","title":"Track F: Rich fixtures + snapshot coverage for visual regression protection","description":"## Objective
Upgrade test fixtures and snapshot coverage so the UI quality we care about is actually exercised by automated tests.

## Why This Exists
Current snapshots use minimal synthetic content that under-represents real-world visual complexity, allowing regressions in styling, hierarchy, and affordances to slip through.

## Scope
- Create richer fixture data (multi-agent roles, tool calls, markdown/code blocks, long snippets, score spread)
- Add snapshot variants covering pills, tabs, detail view, and role gutters
- Ensure tests are deterministic and cheap enough for regular local/CI runs

## Deliverables
- Expanded fixture builders/data helpers
- New snapshot baselines for key visual surfaces
- Test docs clarifying how to regenerate snapshots when intentional UI changes happen

## Completion Criteria
- Visual regressions in key surfaces produce obvious snapshot diffs
- Fixtures represent realistic cass workloads (not toy text-only lines)
- Snapshot updates are deliberate and reviewable","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-02-08T19:33:56.403007457Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T20:44:28.796092040Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.6","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T19:33:56.403007457Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.6","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T19:38:30.594645265Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}],"comments":[{"id":254,"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.6","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"## Track F Intent
If tests do not model realistic UI complexity, regressions will keep recurring.

### Testing Philosophy
Prefer smaller targeted snapshots over giant omnibus snapshots. Keep fixtures rich, deterministic, and purpose-specific so diffs are explainable.","created_at":"2026-02-08T19:41:40Z"}]}
 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.6.1","title":"Build high-fidelity fixture dataset for TUI visual scenarios","description":"## Goal
Create fixture data that mirrors real cass usage patterns and stresses the UI meaningfully.

## Work Items
- Include mixed agent roles (user/assistant/tool/system/other)
- Include markdown-heavy messages with code blocks, headings, lists, links
- Include long snippets, varied score distributions, and source/host metadata
- Include enough rows to exercise list striping/selection/scroll indicators

## Acceptance
- Fixture reveals styling regressions that minimal synthetic data misses
- Dataset remains deterministic and reusable across tests","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T19:37:00.810533151Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T22:23:04.286292505Z","closed_at":"2026-02-08T22:23:04.286266016Z","close_reason":"Completed: deterministic high-fidelity TUI fixture dataset + invariants + render stress coverage","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.6.1","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.1.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T19:39:59.260259733Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.6.1","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.6","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T19:37:00.810533151Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}],"comments":[{"id":361,"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.6.1","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Execution contract for this task:
1) Treat this bead title+description as the authoritative scope; do not rely on external planning docs.
2) Record touched files/functions and behavior surfaces in completion notes.
3) Provide deterministic before/after evidence (tests, snapshots, logs, or captures as applicable).
4) Validate across relevant themes/profiles/breakpoints/degradation levels for this surface.
5) Explicitly document tradeoffs, residual risks, and follow-up opportunities.
6) Do not close until acceptance criteria are demonstrably satisfied with linked evidence artifacts.","created_at":"2026-02-08T20:45:28Z"},{"id":431,"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.6.1","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Execution summary (CyanPuma, 2026-02-08 UTC):

Touched files / behavior surfaces
- `src/ui/app.rs:16537` added `rich_visual_fixture_hits()` as a deterministic high-fidelity TUI corpus with:
  - mixed agent/source provenance
  - markdown-heavy content (headings, lists, links, code blocks, JSON/table/text blocks)
  - long snippets for truncation/wrap stress
  - varied score distribution + source/host metadata for hierarchy stress
- `src/ui/app.rs:16695` added `app_with_rich_visual_fixture()` reusable app builder for rendering tests.
- `src/ui/app.rs:16721` added `rich_visual_fixture_dataset_is_deterministic_and_diverse()` to enforce fixture determinism + richness invariants.
- `src/ui/app.rs:16768` added `rich_visual_fixture_renders_across_layouts_without_panic()` to exercise fixture-backed rendering across narrow/medium/wide layouts.

Acceptance mapping
- Mixed scenario richness: enforced by invariant test checks (agent diversity, markdown/code presence, long snippet presence, remote host metadata, wide score range).
- Deterministic + reusable: fixture is generated by one helper (`rich_visual_fixture_hits`) and consumed by multiple tests via `app_with_rich_visual_fixture`.
- Rendering stress usefulness: no-panic render coverage now runs the richer corpus at multiple breakpoints.

Validation run
- `cargo test rich_visual_fixture_dataset_is_deterministic_and_diverse -- --nocapture`
- `cargo test rich_visual_fixture_renders_across_layouts_without_panic -- --nocapture`
- `cargo check --all-targets`
- `cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings`
- `cargo fmt --check`

Tradeoffs / residual risk
- This bead establishes the canonical dataset + invariant checks; full snapshot expansion consuming this corpus is intentionally left to follow-on snapshot owners (`2dccg.6.2`, `2dccg.8.6`, `2dccg.9.5`, `2dccg.11.3`).
- Role diversity is represented through agent/source-rich payloads in `SearchHit` (the available fixture type on this surface) rather than a separate role field.
","created_at":"2026-02-08T22:22:53Z"}]}
-{"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.6.2","title":"Add snapshot coverage for pills, tabs, role gutters, and detail find states","description":"## Goal
Create the shared baseline snapshot layer for core cross-surface affordances implicated in the ftui quality regression.

## Scope Boundary (Canonical)
This bead is the **foundational snapshot contract** used by Track H/I/K regression suites.
- Includes: minimal, purpose-specific snapshots for pills/tabs/role gutters/find states.
- Excludes: richer search-surface behavior suites (Track H `2dccg.8.6`) and results-surface richness/perf suites (Track I `2dccg.9.5`), which should extend this baseline rather than re-implement it.

## Work Items
- Add focused deterministic snapshots for:
  - Active/inactive filter pills
  - Detail tab bar active vs inactive
  - Role gutter variation across roles
  - Find bar open/closed/no-match/current-match
- Keep each snapshot narrowly scoped and diff-readable.
- Publish reusable fixture slices/helpers that downstream suites (`2dccg.8.6`, `2dccg.9.5`, `2dccg.11.1`, `2dccg.11.3`) can import.

## Acceptance
- Affordance-level regressions fail with small, actionable diffs.
- Downstream suites reuse baseline fixtures/helpers instead of duplicating equivalent snapshot setups.
- Snapshots remain deterministic under fixed fixtures and terminal parameters.","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T19:37:08.815077754Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T23:42:02.358939737Z","closed_at":"2026-02-08T23:42:02.358915622Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.6.2","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.10.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T19:55:06.279015700Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.6.2","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.2.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T19:40:00.496966815Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.6.2","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.2.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T19:40:00.993331446Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.6.2","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.2.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T19:40:11.460627611Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.6.2","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.3.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T19:40:11.520748515Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.6.2","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.4.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T19:40:11.983956610Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.6.2","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.6","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T19:37:08.815077754Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.6.2","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.6.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T19:39:59.583732673Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.6.2","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2kz6t","type":"blocks","created_at": ## Files touched
- src/ui/app.rs: Added 10 snapshot tests covering pills, tabs, role gutters, and find bar

## Snapshot coverage
### Pills (3 tests)
- snapshot_pills_active_vs_inactive: verifies inactive placeholder pills + active filter value rendering
- snapshot_pills_deterministic: repeated renders produce identical output
- snapshot_pills_across_degradation: pill content survives Full/SimpleBorders/NoStyling/EssentialOnly

### Tabs (2 tests)
- snapshot_tab_bar_active_inactive: Messages and Raw tab labels visible, switches correctly
- snapshot_tab_bar_deterministic: repeated renders produce identical output

### Role gutters (1 test)
- snapshot_role_gutters_vary_across_roles: User/Agent/Tool messages produce role prefix symbols in rendered output

### Find bar (4 tests)
- snapshot_find_bar_open_with_matches: query text and match position (1/3) visible
- snapshot_find_bar_no_matches: zero state (0/0 or 'no match') shown
- snapshot_find_bar_closed: no match counts when find disabled
- snapshot_find_bar_across_degradation: find bar query survives all degradation levels

## Reusable fixtures
- Tests use existing make_test_conversation_view(), app_with_hits(), app_with_rich_visual_fixture()
- All tests use render_at_degradation + buffer_to_text pattern for deterministic assertions
- Downstream suites (2dccg.8.6, 2dccg.9.5) can extend these patterns

## Validation
- clippy clean, fmt clean
- All 10 new tests pass; no regressions in existing test suite","created_at":"2026-02-08T23:42:02Z"}]}

- snapshot_pills_deterministic: repeated renders produce identical output
- snapshot_pills_across_degradation: pill content survives Full/SimpleBorders/NoStyling/EssentialOnly

### Tabs (2 tests)

- snapshot_tab_bar_deterministic: repeated renders produce identical output

### Role gutters (1 test)

### Find bar (4 tests)

- snapshot_find_bar_no_matches: zero state (0/0 or 'no match') shown

- All tests use render_at_degradation + buffer_to_text pattern for deterministic assertions

## Validation
- clippy clean, fmt clean
- All 10 new tests pass; no regressions in existing test suite","created_at":"2026-02-08T23:42:02Z"},{"id":455,"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.6.2","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"CyanPuma follow-up completion evidence (2026-02-08): converted previous string-contains checks into true deterministic snapshot baselines.

Touched files:
- src/ui/app.rs
- tests/snapshots/cassapp_baseline_pills_active_inactive.snap
- tests/snapshots/cassapp_baseline_detail_tabs_messages_active.snap
- tests/snapshots/cassapp_baseline_detail_tabs_raw_active.snap
- tests/snapshots/cassapp_baseline_role_gutters_messages.snap
- tests/snapshots/cassapp_baseline_detail_find_closed.snap
- tests/snapshots/cassapp_baseline_detail_find_empty_query.snap
- tests/snapshots/cassapp_baseline_detail_find_no_matches.snap
- tests/snapshots/cassapp_baseline_detail_find_current_match.snap

Implemented reusable baseline helpers in src/ui/app.rs tests:
- assert_affordance_snapshot(...)
- app_with_detail_snapshot_fixture(...)
- role_gutter_snapshot_messages(...)
- render_detail_snapshot_buffer(...)
- render_pill_matrix_snapshot_buffer(...)

Coverage delivered:
- active/inactive pills (matrix snapshot)
- detail tab bar active/inactive (messages + raw active snapshots)
- role gutter variation across User/Agent/Tool/System
- detail find states: closed, empty query, no matches, current match

Deterministic evidence:
- BLESS=1 cargo test snapshot_baseline_ -- --nocapture
- cargo test snapshot_baseline_ -- --nocapture

Quality gates:
- cargo fmt --check ✅
- cargo check --all-targets ✅
- cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings ✅

UBS notes:
- ubs --only=rust src/ui/app.rs returns a large pre-existing warning/critical inventory in this legacy-heavy file; no new cargo/clippy regressions from this lane.","created_at":"2026-02-08T23:55:32Z"}]}
 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.6.3","title":"Add targeted cross-theme and cross-degradation visual regression matrix","description":"## Goal
Ensure visual fixes hold beyond a single theme/capability profile by executing a compact but high-value cross-theme/degradation matrix.

## Scope Boundary (Canonical)
This bead composes matrix coverage from:
- Baseline affordance snapshots (`2dccg.6.2`)
- Search-surface regression suite (`2dccg.8.6`)
- Results-surface regression suite (`2dccg.9.5`)
It is the integrator layer, not a duplicate suite.

## Work Items
- Select compact matrix: key scenario x representative theme x representative degradation tier.
- Snapshot expected hierarchy retention for each matrix cell.
- Keep matrix intentionally small to control CI runtime while preserving defect-detection value.

## Acceptance
- Regressions that only appear in light/high-contrast or degraded mode are caught.
- Matrix remains maintainable and fast enough for routine runs.
- Matrix scenarios trace back to canonical baseline/extension suites rather than duplicated one-off cases.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T19:37:16.364483046Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T21:30:50.893816939Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.6.3","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.3.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T19:40:19.132977284Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.6.3","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.5.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T19:40:12.288248896Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.6.3","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.5.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T20:58:38.778101369Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.6.3","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.6","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T19:37:16.364483046Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.6.3","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.6.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T19:40:12.300017409Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.6.3","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.8.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T20:46:17.285822385Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.6.3","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.9.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T19:55:06.073002282Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}],"comments":[{"id":363,"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.6.3","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Execution contract for this task:

 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.6.4","title":"Document snapshot regeneration and review protocol for intentional UI changes","description":"## Goal
Avoid snapshot churn and accidental approval of regressions by standardizing regeneration/review workflow.

## Work Items
- Document exact commands for updating snapshots
- Define reviewer checklist for distinguishing intended polish vs unintended regression
- Link protocol from TESTING.md or relevant contributor docs

## Acceptance
- Contributors know when and how to refresh snapshots responsibly
- Snapshot PRs include clear rationale tied to bead IDs and visual goals","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"docs","created_at":"2026-02-08T19:37:23.900459778Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T20:45:37.577464531Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.6.4","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.6","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T19:37:23.900459778Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.6.4","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.6.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T19:40:12.004812253Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}],"comments":[{"id":381,"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.6.4","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Track orchestration note:

 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.7","title":"Track G: README/screenshots/install-script unpin + release readiness","description":"## Objective
Complete the outward-facing release transition from old ratatui-pinned docs/install defaults to polished ftui defaults once visual parity is proven.

## Why This Exists
README and installer messaging currently indicate `v0.1.64` pinning (last ratatui build), which undermines adoption of the new architecture and reflects unresolved UX debt.

## Scope
- Refresh screenshots to represent improved ftui UI
- Update README narrative and release gate language
- Remove default version pin in install scripts when quality gates pass
- Run full quality gates and capture go/no-go evidence

## Deliverables
- Updated `README.md` screenshots and explanatory text
- Updated `install.sh` and `install.ps1` behavior/docs
- Final validation report (fmt/check/clippy/tests/smoke) attached to bead comments

## Completion Criteria
- New users install and see improved ftui build by default
- README visuals match current product behavior
- Release decision can be audited from bead history alone","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-02-08T19:34:06.376029162Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T20:44:29.053512984Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.7","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T19:34:06.376029162Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.7","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T19:38:30.299974459Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.7","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.11","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T19:50:13.630104889Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.7","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T19:38:39.670675210Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.7","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T19:38:39.599726356Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.7","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T19:38:40.455366417Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.7","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T19:38:40.190877298Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.7","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T19:38:40.156413878Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}],"comments":[{"id":255,"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.7","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"## Track G Intent
This is the release-control layer that prevents docs/install drift and premature default unpinning.

### Guardrail
Installer unpin is contingent on evidence from parity scoring + regression tests + quality gates, not on schedule pressure.

### Handoff Outcome
By completion, a future agent should be able to audit go/no-go rationale from bead history alone.","created_at":"2026-02-08T19:41:41Z"},{"id":271,"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.7","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"## Release Gate Strengthening

Track G now depends on Track K evidence outputs to prevent premature installer/docs changes.

Key gate dependency:
- `2dccg.7.4` and downstream release tasks require `2dccg.11.8` (verification evidence bundle).

This enforces a strict policy: no default unpin or release messaging change without comprehensive unit + E2E + logging-backed validation.","created_at":"2026-02-08T19:57:48Z"}]}

 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.7.5","title":"Prepare final go/no-go parity report and epic closure checklist","description":"## Goal
Make epic closure auditable and self-contained.

## Work Items

- Link evidence from tracks B/C/D/E/F and quality gates
- Document decision: keep unpinned default or defer with explicit blockers
- Capture follow-up backlog for non-blocking polish items

## Acceptance

- Closure comment includes evidence links and unresolved-risk list (if any)","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T19:38:08.529850203Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T20:45:31.509764993Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.7.5","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.1.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T19:40:44.202198082Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.7.5","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.11.8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T19:55:16.568102915Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.7.5","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.7","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T19:38:08.529850203Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.7.5","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.7.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T19:40:51.983316721Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.7.5","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.7.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T19:40:52.020652089Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.7.5","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.7.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T19:40:52.092186205Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}],"comments":[{"id":367,"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.7.5","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Execution contract for this task:

 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.8","title":"Track H: Search-surface richness restoration (search bar, pills, breadcrumbs, HUD)","description":"## Objective
Restore and exceed ratatui-era search-surface clarity by upgrading the top pane from functional-but-flat to high-signal, context-rich, and visually hierarchical.

## Why This Track Exists
Current plan covered pills/tabs/find/markdown, but search-surface richness still has gaps captured in prior FTUI rehab beads: search-bar affordance depth, breadcrumb emphasis, footer HUD readability, and consistent contextual hints.

## Scope
- Rich mode-aware search-bar rendering
- Filter-pill hierarchy beyond single-style fallback
- Breadcrumb active-crumb emphasis and click-target stability
- Footer HUD lanes for help/progress/latency/cache signal
- Input affordance polish (subtle inset background)

## Deliverables
- Search surface that is instantly scannable under real workloads
- Improved discoverability of state, context, and controls
- Deterministic snapshots/tests for search-surface variants

## Completion Criteria
- Search surface rubric score materially improved vs baseline
- Mouse and keyboard interactions remain correct
- Degradation modes preserve essential hierarchy without visual collapse","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-02-08T19:45:21.843353921Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T20:45:38.403922163Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.8","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T19:45:21.843353921Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.8","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T19:49:35.370976555Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}],"comments":[{"id":383,"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.8","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Track orchestration note:
- This bead is a coordination container. Prefer executing ready leaf tasks under this track.
- Keep scope boundaries explicit to avoid duplicate implementation across sibling tracks.
- Ensure subtask closure writes enough evidence/context so future contributors can continue without external documents.","created_at":"2026-02-08T20:45:38Z"}]}
 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.8.1","title":"Restore rich mode-aware search-bar rendering (title, hints, cursor affordance)","description":"## Goal
Rebuild search-bar rendering so state/mode is obvious at a glance without sacrificing density.

## Scope Boundary (Canonical)
This bead is the single owner for search-input rendering affordance and now **absorbs** prior `2dccg.8.5` scope.
- Includes: title/hint hierarchy, cursor/edit affordance, and subtle query-row inset treatment.
- Excludes: breadcrumb lane (`2dccg.8.2`) and footer HUD lanes (`2dccg.8.4`).

## Work Items
- Improve mode-aware title/context presentation.
- Ensure cursor/edit affordance is visually strong in focused and unfocused states.
- Harmonize inline hint rendering with semantic tokens.
- Add theme-aware inset background for query input row.
- Preserve placeholder/caret contrast and ensure degradation/capability policy drops inset safely.

## Acceptance
- Search state is legible under dark/light/high-contrast presets.
- Focus transitions are obvious without visual noise.
- Input field is immediately identifiable as editable area while remaining subtle.
- No keyboard-input regressions introduced.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T19:45:58.479429555Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T22:06:33.708308834Z","closed_at":"2026-02-08T22:06:33.708286692Z","close_reason":"Completed: mode-aware title + caret + inset restored with full validation","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.8.1","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.10.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T19:50:50.459933537Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.8.1","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T19:50:55.105440532Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.8.1","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.8","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T19:45:58.479429555Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}],"comments":[{"id":368,"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.8.1","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Execution contract for this task:
1) Treat this bead title+description as the authoritative scope; do not rely on external planning docs.
2) Record touched files/functions and behavior surfaces in completion notes.
3) Provide deterministic before/after evidence (tests, snapshots, logs, or captures as applicable).
4) Validate across relevant themes/profiles/breakpoints/degradation levels for this surface.
5) Explicitly document tradeoffs, residual risks, and follow-up opportunities.
6) Do not close until acceptance criteria are demonstrably satisfied with linked evidence artifacts.","created_at":"2026-02-08T20:45:31Z"},{"id":412,"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.8.1","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Canonicalization: absorbed scope from coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.8.5 (query-row inset affordance + contrast/degradation requirements) to remove overlap and keep one owner for search-input rendering.","created_at":"2026-02-08T21:48:55Z"},{"id":427,"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.8.1","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Execution summary (CyanPuma, 2026-02-08 UTC):

Touched files / surfaces
- `src/ui/app.rs:11753` narrow title now uses explicit tokens: `cass | mode:<...> | match:<...>` when theme name is hidden by breakpoint policy.
- `src/ui/app.rs:11795` query-row caret now uses semantic emphasis (`STYLE_KBD_KEY`) in active query mode and muted style otherwise.
- `src/ui/app.rs:11804` query-row inset now uses degradation-aware semantic backgrounds (`STYLE_TAB_ACTIVE` / `STYLE_TAB_INACTIVE`) and is automatically dropped when decorative rendering is disabled.
- `src/ui/app.rs:11818` query line rendering switched to span-based composition for mode labels + editable text + caret affordance.
- `src/ui/style_system.rs:1996` fixed a compile blocker in an override test by adapting to current `Rgb` return type (`to_rgb()` now returns struct, not tuple).

Acceptance/evidence
- Mode-aware title/context: explicit mode+match tags in narrow layouts + theme name retained in medium/wide.
- Cursor/edit affordance: caret remains visible and is semantically emphasized in query-edit mode.
- Inline hint/token harmony: query labels are muted, editable content uses `STYLE_TEXT_PRIMARY`, caret uses `STYLE_KBD_KEY`.
- Query-row inset affordance: subtle themed inset present when styling/decorative layers are available; safely removed under degradation.

Deterministic validation run (all local, with `TMPDIR=/data/projects/coding_agent_session_search/.tmp` due full `/tmp`)
- `cargo test search_title_adapts_to_width -- --nocapture`
- `cargo test search_bar_shows_theme_at_medium_narrow -- --nocapture`
- `cargo test search_title_and_caret_render_across_core_presets -- --nocapture`
- `cargo test mouse_click_in_search_bar_focuses_results -- --nocapture`
- `cargo test tui_pty_search_detail_and_quit_flow --test e2e_tui_smoke_flows -- --nocapture`
- `cargo check --all-targets`
- `cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings`
- `cargo fmt --check`

Tradeoffs / residual risk
- Reused existing semantic tokens (`TAB_*`, `KBD_KEY`) instead of adding new search-specific tokens to keep token surface tight; if design needs finer control, follow-on can split these into dedicated search-input tokens.
- Current regression evidence is structural/textual; richer color/background screenshot matrix remains owned by `coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.8.6`.
","created_at":"2026-02-08T22:06:22Z"}]}

6) Do not close until acceptance criteria are demonstrably satisfied with linked evidence artifacts.","created_at":"2026-02-08T20:45:32Z"},{"id":454,"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.8.2","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"AzureElk claim (2026-02-08): implementing breadcrumb emphasis with styled spans and hierarchy separators.","created_at":"2026-02-08T23:50:01Z"},{"id":456,"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.8.2","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"AzureElk completion (2026-02-08): Rebuilt breadcrumb emphasis with styled spans.

## Files touched
- src/ui/style_system.rs: Added STYLE_CRUMB_ACTIVE, STYLE_CRUMB_INACTIVE, STYLE_CRUMB_SEPARATOR tokens
- src/ui/app.rs: Refactored breadcrumb_line() from flat String to per-segment styled Line with › separators

## Behavior changes
- Active crumbs (filters that are set) render with accent color + bold
- Inactive crumbs (unset filters) render with text_subtle (recede visually)
- Separators use border color (distinct from both active and inactive)
- Separator changed from ' > ' to ' › ' (proper typographic breadcrumb glyph)
- Width-aware elision: gracefully truncates at narrow widths

## Tests (all pass)
- style_system: crumb_active_differs_from_inactive, crumb_active_is_bold, crumb_separator_has_fg, crumb_separator_differs_from_active (4 new)
- app: breadcrumb_contains_all_segments, breadcrumb_active_filter_gets_active_style, breadcrumb_uses_separator_glyph, breadcrumb_renders_in_output, breadcrumb_elides_at_narrow_width (5 new)
- clippy clean, fmt clean","created_at":"2026-02-08T23:55:56Z"}]}
 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.8.3","title":"Upgrade filter-pill hierarchy (active/inactive/edit cues) while preserving click targets","description":"## Goal
Extend pill rendering beyond basic active style so users can quickly parse filter state and edit intent.

## Work Items
- Build on `STYLE_PILL_ACTIVE` wiring to represent inactive/default/editable cues
- Preserve `build_pills_row()` mouse rect integrity
- Ensure pill readability under degradation and narrow widths

## Acceptance
- Pill states are visually distinct and behaviorally correct
- Mouse and keyboard interactions remain stable

6) Do not close until acceptance criteria are demonstrably satisfied with linked evidence artifacts.","created_at":"2026-02-08T20:45:32Z"},{"id":444,"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.8.3","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"AzureElk claim (2026-02-08): implementing filter-pill hierarchy with inactive/editable cues.","created_at":"2026-02-08T23:10:25Z"},{"id":446,"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.8.3","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"AzureElk completion (2026-02-08): Implemented filter-pill hierarchy.

## Files touched
- src/ui/style_system.rs: Added STYLE_PILL_INACTIVE (pill.inactive) and STYLE_PILL_LABEL (pill.label) tokens with definitions in build_stylesheet
- src/ui/app.rs: Renamed active_filter_pills() → filter_pills() to include inactive placeholders; refactored build_pills_row() from monolithic String to per-pill Spans with label/value split; updated rendering call site

## Behavior changes
- Filter pills now show all available filter slots (agent, ws, time, source) — active filters show as bold/accent, inactive show as muted/subtle
- Per-pill styling: label portion (e.g. 'agent:') uses STYLE_PILL_LABEL (muted, bold), value portion uses STYLE_PILL_ACTIVE or STYLE_PILL_INACTIVE based on pill.active
- Inactive pills are clickable — clicking opens the editor for that filter type (same as active pills)
- Mouse rect integrity preserved: build_pills_row() still produces correct (Rect, Pill) hit-test pairs

## Tests (all pass)
- style_system: pill_inactive_differs_from_pill_active, pill_inactive_is_not_bold, pill_active_is_bold, pill_inactive_has_background_for_all_presets, pill_label_has_foreground_and_bold, pill_hierarchy_is_visually_ordered (6 new, 100 total)
- app: filter_pills_include_inactive_slots, filter_pills_mark_active_filters, build_pills_row_produces_per_pill_spans, inactive_pill_click_opens_editor (4 new)
- Existing pill click tests pass unchanged

## Validation
- clippy clean, fmt clean
- All 6 theme presets tested (Dark, Light, HighContrast, Catppuccin, Dracula, Nord)
- Pre-existing test failures unrelated (render_80x24_no_panic, budget_upgrade_debounce, find_bar_narrow_widths)","created_at":"2026-02-08T23:32:02Z"}]}
 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.8.4","title":"Restore footer HUD lanes (help/progress/latency/cache/degradation signals)","description":"## Goal
Make footer information dense but readable, preserving fast situational awareness under active searching/indexing.

## Work Items
- Reintroduce clear lane structure for hints, progress, latency, and degradation state
- Ensure semantic key/description styling remains consistent
- Keep readability at narrow widths with graceful truncation strategy

## Acceptance
- Footer communicates status without visual clutter
- High-frequency cues remain visible under load
- Snapshot tests cover lane permutations","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T19:46:14.983966941Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T22:54:16.717685385Z","closed_at":"2026-02-08T22:54:16.717661660Z","close_reason":"Completed: footer HUD lanes restored with semantic styling, width-aware truncation, regression tests, and full quality-gate validation.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.8.4","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.2.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T19:50:47.516242383Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.8.4","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.8","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T19:46:14.983966941Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.8.4","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.8.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T19:51:45.259647858Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}],"comments":[{"id":371,"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.8.4","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Execution contract for this task:

6) Do not close until acceptance criteria are demonstrably satisfied with linked evidence artifacts.","created_at":"2026-02-08T20:45:33Z"},{"id":439,"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.8.4","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Implemented footer HUD lane restoration with priority-based truncation and semantic styling.

Scope delivered:
- Replaced flat status string rendering with explicit lane composition (hits, query, perf, runtime, scope, view) using semantic token styles.
- Added width-aware lane builder that preserves at least one anchor lane and elides first-lane values when constrained.
- Prioritized high-frequency signals (perf and runtime including degradation state) ahead of lower-priority scope/view lanes under narrow width.
- Preserved styled key-hint row behavior and existing hint ranking logic.

Files/functions touched:
- src/ui/app.rs
  - Added FooterHudLane + build_footer_hud_line(...) helper.
  - Updated search-surface footer render path in view(...) to use structured lanes.
  - Added warm-cache fixture helper make_test_conversation_view().
  - Added tests:
    - status_footer_hud_surfaces_progress_perf_cache_and_degradation_signals
    - status_footer_hud_truncates_to_core_lanes_on_narrow_widths
- src/ui/style_system.rs
  - Fixed API drift in detail-find test assertions (query == query.bold() semantics).

Deterministic evidence (executed):
- cargo test status_footer -- --nocapture
- cargo test degradation_level_status_tag_shown_when_degraded -- --nocapture
- cargo test tui_pty_search_detail_and_quit_flow --test e2e_tui_smoke_flows -- --nocapture
- cargo check --all-targets
- cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings
- cargo fmt --check

Notes/tradeoffs:
- Lane fitting is character-budget based (consistent and deterministic) rather than pixel/display-width aware; this is adequate for current monospaced TUI surfaces.
- Existing ubs reports on this single-file scan include substantial pre-existing whole-file findings unrelated to this bead; cargo/clippy gates are clean.","created_at":"2026-02-08T22:54:02Z"}]}
